breaking.title: West Asia War LIVE: Trump says Iran ceasefire ‘is over’
breaking.summary: After launching strikes on Iran, the U.S. President says the memorandum of ‌understanding signed with Iran is ‘over’ but negotiations can continue

breaking.title: Funeral prayers in Iraq for Iranian supreme leader commence after body arrives in holy city
breaking.summary: Iran's new supreme leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, has yet to make an appearance in the funeral ceremonies, which are unfolding over several days. He is believed to be in hiding after reportedly being wounded in the airstrike that killed his father

breaking.title: Trump blasts Spain, targets Greenland at NATO summit
breaking.summary: With tensions peaking after an overnight flareup between U.S. and Iranian forces, Mr. Trump declared the Iran ceasefire was “over”, then took aim at NATO allies who failed to back his campaign against Tehran

breaking.title: Russian attacks kill three across Ukraine, strike Kyiv for second consecutive night
breaking.summary: Russia's Defence Ministry said the military carried out a strike on arms industry facilities in Kyiv overnight, hitting a Flamingo cruise missiles plant and a facility assembling mid and long range drones

breaking.title: New U.S. attacks on Iran were absolutely necessary, NATO chief says
breaking.summary: The ​U.S. military unleashed a ⁠new wave of strikes against Iran after three tankers were hit by projectiles in the ‌Strait of Hormuz, putting pressure on ‌an ⁠already fragile ceasefire

breaking.title: At least eight people feared trapped as building collapses in Pune’s Pimpri Chinchwad; rescue efforts under way
breaking.summary: “Prima facie, it appears that due to heavy rains, the waste mound became loose and collapsed on top of the building,” Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation Commissioner said

breaking.title: Tehran targets Bahrain, Kuwait after U.S. strikes and limits Iran's oil sales over ship attacks
breaking.summary: Negotiations to reach a final deal on reopening the Strait of Hormuz had been due to start after Khamenei's burial. But the new attacks has thrown that into question

breaking.title: US strikes target Iranian military boats
breaking.summary: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
